_doc: Thumbnail tuning. Top-level numeric keys are item IDs ({ alpha, beta, distanceMult, rotationY } in radians/multipliers) consumed by client/src/rendering/ItemIcon.ts. The _thumbnail_assets object is keyed by asset path ({ alpha, beta, distanceMult, rotationY }) and consumed by editor/src/assets-system/ThumbnailRenderer.ts. Underscore-prefixed top-level keys are ignored by the item loader.
